description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a predominantly white exterior and large wooden-framed windows. The front facade features a curved balcony above the main entrance, supported by columns, and a carport with a slatted roof on one side sheltering a parked car. The house has multiple balconies with black railings, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The rear of the house is more minimal, with fewer windows and a tall, narrow vertical window feature. The roof is flat, and the structure is set on a rectangular plot with a small patch of green lawn surrounding it.
description: A modern two-story white house with large wooden-framed windows, balconies, a carport, and a flat roof, featuring both curved and angular architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a curved balcony, columns, large windows, and a carport with a car on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal windows, a tall vertical window feature, and a mostly solid white wall.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting two balconies with black railings and large windows, as well as the green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, car, and a secondary entrance with a balcony above.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a curved balcony above, supported by columns, wide steps, and a prominent wooden door
